source.description: Built-in image generation contact sheet reviewed before cropping; approved panel 6 is saved as the finished raster artwork.
source.notes: All step frames are cropped from the same generated contact sheet so the birdhouse pose, post, roof, doorway, perch, and wood details stay consistent.

process_strategy: Use one six-panel contact sheet that builds the birdhouse from guide shapes to contour, roof, doorway, perch, wood grain, leaves, color, and final keeper-line strength.

final_elements.name: vertical post
final_elements.description: The narrow wooden support post centered under the birdhouse.

final_elements.name: simple house body
final_elements.description: The front-facing rectangular birdhouse body sitting above the post.

final_elements.name: pitched roof
final_elements.description: The triangular roof cap with a slightly thicker lower edge.

final_elements.name: round doorway
final_elements.description: The circular bird entrance centered on the house front.

final_elements.name: small perch peg
final_elements.description: The short peg placed below the round doorway.

final_elements.name: wood plank seams
final_elements.description: Subtle vertical plank lines on the birdhouse front.

final_elements.name: wood grain and nail dots
final_elements.description: Small handmade grain marks and nail dots on the roof, body, and post.

final_elements.name: leaf sprigs
final_elements.description: A few small leaves near the post that ground the birdhouse without clutter.

final_elements.name: blue, brown, and green colored-pencil shading
final_elements.description: Restrained blue paint on the house, brown wood on the roof and post, and green leaves.

final_elements.name: soft cast shadow
final_elements.description: A pale graphite shadow beneath the post.

frames.step_name: Block in the post and house
frames.visible_job: Places the vertical support post and the front rectangle of the birdhouse with light construction marks.
Adds the triangular roof and a thicker roof lip while keeping the post and house body unchanged.
Adds the round entrance hole and short perch peg on the birdhouse front.
Adds subtle plank seams to the house front without changing the silhouette.
Adds wood grain, nail dots, small leaf sprigs, restrained colored-pencil shading, and the cast shadow.
introduces: blue, brown, and green colored-pencil shading

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing roof, body, doorway, perch, post, plank, grain, leaf, color, and shadow marks without adding new parts.
allowed_changes: paper texture from the saved contact sheet

rejection_checks: No post, house body, roof, doorway, perch, plank seam, leaf, grain mark, or core color choice should first appear in the final image.
The birdhouse must keep the same centered front-facing pose and proportions in every frame.
The final image must not add birds, extra flowers, background scenery, or decorative trim absent from the process frames.
Do not use separately prompted step images that drift from this contact sheet.
